creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
building multimedia/xine fails with missing libcaca dependency.
	variable "XINE_PLUGINSDIR" in multimedia/xine/Makefile does not match
	with that of multimedia/libxine/Makefile, and this prevent finding
	caca plugins to xine.

Fix: 

if there are no reasons to this different values, make it the same.
